## Checklist

- [ ] I edited `data/resources.json` (not the README's list directly).
- [ ] I ran `python scripts/validate.py` and it passed.
- [ ] I ran `python scripts/generate_readme.py` and committed the regenerated `README.md`.
- [ ] The link works and the project is maintained.
- [ ] The description is one sentence (10–280 chars) and not marketing copy.
